subject: Ledian, a ladybug-like Pokemon with multiple arms
description: A red-and-black beetle-like creature with white spots, four arms, and two antennae is depicted in an energetic leaping or flying pose. The body is rounded and compact, with a wing-case pattern visible on its back and small limbs spread wide. The background shows a warm outdoor scene with grass and trees rendered in soft yellows and greens. The composition centers the creature against an open sky-like backdrop, conveying speed and motion.
foreground: red-and-black spotted beetle-like creature in a dynamic leaping pose
background: warm outdoor scene with grass and trees in soft yellows and greens
emotion: energetic, active; wide-spread limbs suggest motion and aggression
